name: Deepgram (uvx)
description: Connect to Deepgram's speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and audio intelligence APIs. Tools are fetched from Deepgram's API at runtime, so new capabilities appear without a package upgrade.

inputs.label: Deepgram API Key
inputs.description: API key used to authenticate with the Deepgram API. Create one in the Deepgram console.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in to the Deepgram console at https://console.deepgram.com
2. Open the API Keys section
3. Create a new API key
4. Copy the key and paste it here

auth.instructions: Create a Deepgram API key in the console at https://console.deepgram.com and provide it as DEEPGRAM_API_KEY.
